Classify a Chao tone numeral string as a shape

Source: R/chao.R
classify_contour.Rd

Returns a short shape name ("level", "rising", "falling", "dipping", "peaking", or a finer "low level" / "mid level" / "high level" for single-digit / repeated-digit strings).

Usage

classify_contour(chao_str)

Arguments

chao_str

A character string of Chao digits (1-5), e.g. "55", "214", "35".

Value

A character string naming the shape.

Examples

classify_contour("55")    # "high level"
#> [1] "high level"
classify_contour("214")   # "dipping"
#> [1] "dipping"
classify_contour("35")    # "rising"
#> [1] "rising"
classify_contour("51")    # "falling"
#> [1] "falling"

On this page

Chenzi Xu, Cong Zhang
